canonical_definition: Producing incorrect visual claims or unsupported descriptions when interpreting an image.
papers: Feast Your Eyes:  Mixture-of-Resolution Adaptation for Multimodal Large Language Models
See What You Are Told: Visual Attention Sink in Large Multimodal Models

definitions.text: Producing incorrect visual claims or unsupported descriptions when interpreting an image.
definitions.paper: Feast Your Eyes:  Mixture-of-Resolution Adaptation for Multimodal Large Language Models

relationships.paper: DEEM: Diffusion models serve as the eyes of large language models for image perception
relationships.evidence: “The MLLM-specific benchmarks are POPE Li et al. (2023c), MME Fu et al. (2023), MMB Liu et al. (2023d), SEED Li et al. (2023a) and MM-Vet Yu et al. (2023). Compared to common VL evaluations, these benchmarks aim to evaluate MLLMs from various aspects, such as fine-grained reasoning and visual hallucination.”

iclr25: DEEM: Diffusion models serve as the eyes of large language models for image perception

relationships.paper: See What You Are Told: Visual Attention Sink in Large Multimodal Models
relationships.evidence: Visual hallucination task evaluates whether the response of the model is consistent with the image content to ensure the trustworthiness and reliability of the model. We use CHAIR (Rohrbach et al., 2018), POPE (Li et al., 2023c), and MMHal-Bench (Sun et al., 2023).

iclr25: See What You Are Told: Visual Attention Sink in Large Multimodal Models
